_m.lb: “This Thing Was Not Done in a Corner”
_m.x: “This Thing Was Not Done in a Corner” By President Gordon B. Hinckley President of the Church My dear brethren, we have received good counsel this evening. Since we met last April, I have been much out among our people.…
In the daytime also he led them with a cloud, and all the night with a light of fire.
They meet with darkness in the daytime, and grope in the noonday as in the night.
In the dark they dig through houses, which they had marked for themselves in the daytime: they know not the light.
O my God, I cry in the daytime, but thou hearest not; and in the night season, and am not silent.
Yet the Lord will command his lovingkindness in the daytime, and in the night his song shall be with me, and my prayer unto the God of my life.
